title: doc: read_positions staleness invariant not documented for new-chat SSE path
description: When a new Chat arrives via SSE Chat/changes (handle_state_change -> chat_delta_sync), read_positions is NOT refreshed. The SelectChat auto-mark-read path (client_task.rs:248) silently skips marking when read_positions.get(&chat_id) returns None — newly created chats won't be auto-marked read on open until the next load_read_positions call (restart or MarkRead fallback). Nowhere in the code is the invariant stated: 'read_positions must be refreshed when new chats arrive via delta sync'. A contributor adding a chat-creation flow would not know to call load_read_positions.
